content: [PHASE1-SETUP] Add dependencies: SQLAlchemy, psycopg2, PyJWT, python-dotenv, bcrypt
[PHASE1-DATABASE] Create database models (User, Franchise, Customer, Service, Job, Vehicle, Invoice, Payment)
[PHASE1-AUTH] Implement JWT + API Key authentication system with middleware
[PHASE1-API] Build core API routes (auth, customers, services, bookings, jobs)
[PHASE1-CONFIG] Add Docker configuration + environment variable management
